name: It Could Be a Snickers Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soft diet ice cream, Cool Whip, chunky peanut butter, and sugar-free butterscotch pudding in a mixer.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Stir in the Grape-Nuts cereal.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
5. Cover with plastic wrap or foil.
6. Freeze for several hours until firm.
Makes 4 servings.
